message:
Command `# Check for any warnings or notable patterns across all logs
grep -n "ERROR\|FAIL\|Warning\|error\|===NOTE===\|BFM_CHECK\|SKIP\|CONTENTION_DIRECTED.*SKIP" \
  /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build/*.log | head -60` executed with exit code 0.
